# BuMa Technology

> BuMa Technology (bumatechnology.com) is an iPaaS strategic partner and Oracle NetSuite
> specialist for mid-market ecommerce and order-to-cash brands. BuMa designs, builds, and
> supports Celigo-based integrations, NetSuite ERP connectivity, AI workflow automation,
> and operational dashboards. Based in Orlando, FL.

## Services

- [Celigo iPaaS Integration](https://bumatechnology.com/celigo-ipaas): Celigo-orchestrated
  integration architecture — commerce, ERP, payments, fulfillment, EDI (X12 850/855/856/810).
- [NetSuite ERP](https://bumatechnology.com/netsuite-integration): NetSuite as the system of
  record — order sync, revenue recognition, subsidiary mapping, audit-ready flows.
- [AI Automation](https://bumatechnology.com/ai-automation): AI agents for invoice parsing,
  cash application, email classification, and order-exception resolution.
- [Operational Dashboards](https://bumatechnology.com/dashboards): Real-time, action-oriented
  operational views for ops and finance teams.

## Work

- [Client work overview](https://bumatechnology.com/work): Cizzle Brands (flagship), Larroudé,
  Ryse Supplements, Stateside Brands (EDI), Pit Viper, HumanRace, Innovu, AlivaMab Biologics,
  Maine Coast Heritage Trust, Mpire Financial, and others.
- [Cizzle Brands case study](https://bumatechnology.com/work/cizzle-brands): Six Shopify
  storefronts, two 3PLs, and a new ERP unified on Celigo for a publicly traded company.
- [Larroudé case study](https://bumatechnology.com/work/larroude): Shopify, ERP, and 3PL
  orchestration for a luxury footwear brand.

## Company

- [About](https://bumatechnology.com/about): 20+ senior practitioners; 500+ projects shipped
  in the company's history.
- [Contact](https://bumatechnology.com/contact): 189 S Orange Ave, Suite 2020 #B, Orlando, FL
  32801 · 321-527-8061 · support@bumatechnology.com. Response within one business day.
